comment: Generate index.d.ts (+ .d.ts.map) for the hand-authored JS leaves from their JSDoc. emitDeclarationOnly writes only declarations — the .js stays the authored, shipped source. Because each .d.ts is now derived from its source, it cannot drift; check-dts-emit.mjs re-emits and byte-compares. Run via `npm run dts:emit`. (checkJs is intentionally off for now: the internal pure helpers are untyped and the opt-object defaults trip noImplicitAny; signature-checking is a future enhancement, tracked separately.)
